Super thankful for the event the @hibbettofficial @hibbetttampaflorida team put together in Tampa, Florida in partnership with @nike I got the chance to give some game back to the youth ahead of March Madness, build real relationships that mean more than anything, and most importantly put smiles on the kids’ faces. Honestly, this is the type of stuff that means the most to me. Ever since I was a little kid, I always had a vision for moments like this… and to see it all coming together in ways I couldn’t even imagine is a true blessing. All glory to God. Thank you to Nike, thank you to Hibbett,
